file_insights.scope: UI formatting - state group header colorization

patterns_discovered.name: ANSI Color Wrapping Pattern
patterns_discovered.description: Wrapping text with color code at start and RESET constant at end
patterns_discovered.reusability: high - applies to other output elements

patterns_discovered.name: State-based Color Function
patterns_discovered.description: Using state_ansi(state) to dynamically map state strings to color codes

patterns_discovered.name: Println Formatting
patterns_discovered.description: Multi-line println! macro for readability with color variables
patterns_discovered.style: readable - breaks complex format string across lines

gotchas_discovered.impact: Function must be defined and exported in scope
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Verify state_ansi() handles all valid state values

gotchas_discovered.impact: Color reset must be available as constant or macro
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Ensure RESET is properly defined in module

gotchas_discovered.impact: Only header is colored, card count remains uncolored

approach_outcome.strategy: Direct modification of existing println! statement

recommendations.suggestion: Consider extending color formatting to card count for visual consistency
Verify state_ansi() function handles edge cases and all state enum variants
Review other print functions in list.rs for similar colorization opportunities
Verify terminal output displays correctly with color codes
